Behavior Score Configuration

Data Management

⚠️ Reset & Clear Data
Use 🗃️ Data Hub above to selectively delete behavior logs, students, seating data, or AI profiles. Factory Reset is available inside the Danger Zone section. All deletions are permanent.

☁️ Cloud Sync (Supabase)

Not connected — enter your Supabase credentials below
Realtime + offline-safe: Changes save locally first, sync to Supabase automatically, and other devices update live via Realtime (students + behaviors tables). No manual upload.
⚠️ Opened as a local file:
📋 WhatsApp Log table (run once in Supabase SQL Editor) 

              
            

            Sync works best when served via HTTP. For full PWA + sync support, open via your web server or place the file in your Capacitor www/ folder and run npx cap run android.

              📈 Predictions
            

            

          

        


        
        

          

            
🔬 Clinical Educational Profile

            

              Select two students to generate a unique correlation analysis between their formative behavior patterns and English proficiency. Each profile is clinically unique — never the same template twice.
            

            

          

        


        
        

          

            
📋 Adaptive Lesson Synthesizer

            

              Generate a 40-minute ELT lesson plan with 3-tier differentiation (Remedial / Core / Extension), kinesthetic No-Chair activity, and a fresh gamified tool each time.
            

            

          

        


        
        

          

            
🎯 Intervention Protocols

            

              At-risk students identified from formative data. Click any student to generate a unique intervention protocol. Each click produces a different creative approach — 10 protocols per problem type, zero repetition.

      🧩
      
Smart Group Assignment

      
    


    
    


      
      


        
        

          
Grouping Strategy

          

            

              ⚖️
              
Balanced

              
Even mix of levels + risk distribution

            

            

              ⭐
              
Leader-Led

              
Top students anchor each group

            

            

              🧬
              
Behavior-Smart

              
Separates disruptors, pairs leaders with passive students

            

            

              📊
              
Homogeneous

              
Same level together for differentiated teaching

            

          

        


        
        

          
Groups

          

            
            
4

            
          

        


      


      
      

        ⚖️ Balanced — Each group receives students from all performance tiers. High-risk students are spread across groups. Ensures no group is overburdened. Best for general collaborative tasks.
      


      
      

        

          
🧩

          
Press Generate Groups to assign students intelligently.

        

      


    


    
    

      
      
      

      
        Balance
        

        —
      
      
    


  








  

    

      🪑
      
Smart Seating Planner

      
    

    

      
      

        
Seating Strategy

        

          

            
👁️

            
Teacher Focus

            
At-risk & passive students up front. Leaders in middle. Strong performers in back.

          

          

            
🔀

            
Dispersed

            
No two disruptors adjacent. Leaders spread between passive students.

          

          

            
🧩

            
Group-Based

            
Seats assigned to honour existing Smart Group assignments. Each group clusters together.

          

          

            
🔄

            
Rotation

            
Everyone moves. Front → back, left → right. No student stays in the same zone.

          

        

      


      
      

        👁️ Teacher Focus — Disruptive and at-risk students sit in the front rows where you can monitor and support them. Passive students also sit near the front to encourage participation. Leaders and stable students fill the middle and back.
      


      
      

        
📋 TEACHER'S DESK — FRONT OF CLASS

        

          Press Generate to preview the seating plan.
        

      


      
      

        Arrangement quality
